Orbit **0.1.0** is the first public release — a controller-first game launcher for macOS, built with Tauri 2, React, and SQLite.

## Highlights

- Fullscreen launcher UI inspired by PS5, Nintendo Switch, and Apple TV
- Import from **Steam**, **Astris**, **GameHub**, **macOS apps**, and manual paths
- **Launch games** with playtime tracking and hide-window-during-play
- **Three theme shells** (Orbit, PS5, Switch 2) plus custom JSON themes
- **Gamepad + keyboard** navigation with spatial focus

## What's included

### Library
- Home hero with recent game rows and glass activity dashboard
- Filterable library grid and search
- Game details — playtime, install size, achievements
- Edit title, description, and artwork (portrait / landscape / icon)

### Imports
- Steam library sync
- Astris folder scan (`.nsp` / `.xci`)
- macOS Applications
- GameHub (experimental)
- Manual file picker

### Themes
- **Orbit Default** — cinematic hero rows
- **PlayStation 5** — immersive artwork layout
- **Switch 2** — square tiles and bottom dock
- Drop custom `.json` themes in `~/Library/Application Support/Orbit/themes/`

### Controller mapping
| Input | Action |
| --- | --- |
| D-pad / stick | Navigate |
| A / Cross | Select |
| B / Circle | Back |
| X / Square | Edit properties |
| Y / Triangle | Add game |
| L1 / R1 | Switch sections |
| Menu | Settings |

Keyboard: arrows, Enter, Escape, `F`, `C`, `[` `]`, `M`

## Install

**Requirements:** macOS 12+, Apple Silicon (this release builds for `aarch64`).

1. Download **`Orbit-0.1.0-aarch64.dmg`** below
2. Open the DMG and drag **Orbit** to Applications
3. Launch from Applications — grant permissions if macOS prompts for file access

Verify downloads with `SHA256SUMS.txt`.

## Build from source

```bash
git clone https://github.com/LFSCamargo/orbit.git
cd orbit
yarn install
yarn tauri:dev        # development
yarn release:macos    # local release build
```

See [RUNNING.md](https://github.com/LFSCamargo/orbit/blob/main/RUNNING.md) and [docs/THEMES.md](https://github.com/LFSCamargo/orbit/blob/main/docs/THEMES.md).

## Known limitations

- macOS only
- No Steam login, cloud sync, or auto artwork scraping
- GameHub importer is experimental
- Intel Mac users: build locally with `yarn release:macos -- --arch universal`
